name: ckap-v3-render-supabase
description: Central Krabi Analytics Platform Render + Supabase package

scripts.build: npm --prefix frontend install && npm --prefix frontend run build
scripts.build:frontend: npm --prefix frontend install && npm --prefix frontend run build
scripts.build:backend: npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix backend run build
scripts.check: npm --prefix backend run build && npm --prefix frontend run build
